ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent or guardian */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent or guardian */,
  "parent_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent or guardian */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the school */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., enrolled, graduated, dropped out) */,
  "female" INTEGER /* Gender of the student (0 = Male, 1 = Female) */,
  "race" INTEGER /* Race of the student */,
  "ses" INTEGER /* Socio-economic status of the student */,
  "schtyp" INTEGER /* Type of school the student attends */,
  "prog" INTEGER /* Academic program the student is enrolled in */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the student attends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_prog FOREIGN KEY ("prog") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Reading score of the student */,
  "write" INTEGER /* Writing score of the student */,
  "math" INTEGER /* Math score of the student */,
  "science" INTEGER /* Science score of the student */,
  "socst" INTEGER /* Social Studies score of the student */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the performance was recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year in which the performance was recorded */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the student */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who recorded the performance */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., midterm, final, standardized test) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was taken */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the teacher */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject(s) taught by the teacher */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Highest educational qualification of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private) */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic program */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree awarded upon completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the student
